Tool correctly added missing href prop (href='#section-1') to JumpLinksItem. pf-codemods only added @ts-expect-error comment as a workaround. Tool actually fixed the breaking change.

Tool fully migrated KebabToggle to new Dropdown pattern with MenuToggle variant='plain' and EllipsisVIcon. pf-codemods only provided manual stubs. Complete migration vs no migration.
Both tool and pf-codemods correctly replaced isOverflowLabel prop with variant='overflow' on Label.
Tool correctly renamed leftBorderVariant to variant on LogSnippet. Cleaner output than pf-codemods which added unnecessary type assertion ('as any').

Correctly unchanged. This test case is a placeholder for CSS import path migration (LogViewer stylesheet moved from @patternfly/react-core to @patternfly/react-log-viewer). No component code to migrate.

issues: Tool used anchor tag instead of Button component
notes: Tool restructured LoginMainFooterLinksItem to pass content as children using an anchor tag. Expected outcome specifies using a Button component. pf-codemods correctly uses Button with icon prop, though with complex spread syntax. Tool's approach works but doesn't match the idiomatic PF6 pattern.
